name: One Punch man-RPG
description:
List of characters present in this bot:

  1. Atomic Samurai

  2. Blast

  3. Drive Knight

  4. Fubuki

  5. Flashy Flash

  6. Genos

  7. King

  8. Metal Bat

  9. Metal Knight

  10. Mumen Rider

  11. Pig God

  12. Puri-Puri Prisoner

  13. Saitama

  14. Superalloy Darkshine

  15. Sweet Mask (Amai Mask)

  16. Tanktop Master

  17. Tatsumaki

  18. Watchdog Man

  19. Zombieman

Hey, I made this bot with a different format from the others.I tried to include as many characters as possible without causing memory bugs or overloading the LLM. Because of this, some characters may not have their appearance data in the bot's memory, so the bot might (and probably will) invent the appearance of characters it doesn't have detailed descriptions for during the RP. There are a few things that might happen, but they are bugs of the LLM itself, such as the bot responding on your behalf or messages being repetitive sometimes. A simple solution for this is to delete the part where the bot answered for you or said something you don't find interesting for the RP, and just continue the roleplay. Feel free to share your opinion about the bot and any possible improvements (that are within my reach) for me to make. I think that's it. Have fun!
creator: Cafezero
